creator: az@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You need install ports/ports-mgmt/portlint, run portlint -A inside your 
port dir and fix all errors.  Also we have nice guide about ports 
(http://www.freebsd.org/doc/ru/books/porters-handbook/)  which you can 
read and use to make a better quality of ports.
